Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC. is present.
Represented by Didi McDonald.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Harry Devenney is present.
Attorney Lauren M. Michals representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per plaintiff's attorney.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
